description:
India Book (IB) IV,8 (ח9). Legal testimony. Location: Aden. Dating: ca. summer 1131 CE. 

Fragment (upper right corner). The handwriting is very similar to that of the North African trader Yosef b. ʿEzra (cf. T-S 20.37 and BL OR 5566D.24 + T-S 10J16.8). This document alludes to controversies and confusion in Aden; the details of the story are almost entirely missing. (Information from Goitein and Friedman, India Book IV.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
